name: find_securities_to_buy
description: Full pipeline: scan → filter by volume → check TA → risk check → execute

steps.name: request_scan
steps.description: Request occipital lobe to scan for buy patterns

steps.name: filter_volume
steps.description: Only keep matches with volume > 1.5x average

steps.name: risk_check
steps.description: Position sizing, exposure limits, stop loss placement

steps.name: execute_trade
steps.description: Execute trade via Alpaca with stop loss

escalation_conditions: Risk check fails on all candidates
Three consecutive failed trades in same session
